query:
ALTER TABLE invoices MODIFY COLUMN type ENUM('offer','invoice','credit_note','order_confirmation','purchase_order','delivery_note') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'offer';
ALTER TABLE invoice_sequences MODIFY COLUMN type ENUM('invoice','offer','credit_note','order_confirmation','purchase_order','delivery_note') NOT NULL;
